runTitle: Vercel Production Playwright MCP - Artifact Intent BFF Release QA (v8.12.92)
coveredSurfaces: GitLab release tag pipeline 2578503432 completed successfully for v8.12.92 at commit 105f9b17997e18500bdf80fac38fba0310d4d367
release smoke verified /, /login, and /api/version on production with expected version 8.12.92
Vercel production deployment dpl_BrE1dBffAFfHfrKEuqDdWXD1qf7t is Ready and aliases https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app
production /api/version returns version 8.12.92, frontend 8.12.92, releaseTag v8.12.92, commit 105f9b17997e18500bdf80fac38fba0310d4d367, and GitLab pipeline 2578503432
landing page renders OpenManager AI v8.12.92, guest session state, and dashboard CTA
/dashboard renders 18 servers, 17 online, 1 warning, 0 risk, 0 offline, OTel slot 94/143 at 15:40 KST, and resource summary CPU 30 / MEM 47 / Disk 37
AI sidebar opens from dashboard and shows AI Chat, automatic report, anomaly tabs, AI Engine Ready, and dashboard-consistent 18-server summary
/api/ai/artifact-intent classifies '서버 상태 스냅샷' as server-snapshot with reason server_snapshot_implicit_artifact_keyword, ruleVersion 2026-05-15-v1, decidedBy bff
/api/ai/artifact-intent classifies 'api-was-dc1-01 이상감지 분석해줘' as server-monitoring-analysis with serverId api-was-dc1-01, reason server_monitoring_action_pattern, decidedBy bff
/api/ai/artifact-intent classifies 'CPU 임계치 90% 넘으면 슬랙 알림 규칙 만들어줘' as ops-procedure with procedureType alert-rule, reason ops_procedure_action_pattern, decidedBy bff
/api/ai/artifact-intent classifies '장애 리포트 만들어줘' as incident-report with reason incident_report_action_pattern, decidedBy bff
/api/ai/artifact-intent returns kind none for normal conversational query 'CPU 높은 서버 알려줘' with reason local_gate_none
/api/ai/artifact-intent returns kind none for capacity forecast conversational query with reason local_gate_none
AI sidebar UI generated the server status snapshot artifact through the BFF intent path: total 18, warning 1, risk 0, average CPU 29.6%, top servers, and MD/JSON download buttons
standard five-question conversational AI QA passed: overall summary, web-server-01 alias detail, 24h peak load time, immediate action query, and network-problem follow-up
critical product navigation and BFF API requests succeeded during Playwright MCP walkthrough
intent API repeated probe intentionally hit the aiAnalysis 10/min rate limiter; subsequent reset check returned 200, so the 429 entries are treated as non-blocking guard behavior
Vercel usage check after QA remains normal with effective 1.9358 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 1827
skippedSurfaces: OAuth provider login was skipped because guest session covers the release-facing access path for this targeted production artifact routing QA
Mobile viewport regression was skipped because this run focused on desktop Vercel artifact BFF migration verification
Cloud Run admin /monitoring was skipped because the changed surface is frontend-to-BFF artifact intent routing; release smoke already verified deployment health
Full modal/detail pack was skipped because no modal/detail implementation changed in this routing migration
Vision/image-upload QA was skipped because Vision was outside the artifact intent BFF migration scope

expertAssessments.rationale: Artifact intent routing now resolves through the BFF classifier in production, direct API checks returned decidedBy=bff for artifact prompts, normal conversational prompts stayed kind=none, and the standard five-question conversational QA passed.
GitLab tag pipeline, Vercel deployment readiness, production smoke, /api/version metadata, and Vercel usage checks all passed for v8.12.92.
Local type/lint/test/contract gates passed before release, and Playwright MCP covered production API classification, UI artifact generation, dashboard state, and standard conversational AI behavior.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period 2026-06-01T07:00:00.000Z..2026-06-05T06:52:06.423Z; effective 1.9358 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 1827. No unexpected billed usage observed after v8.12.92 release QA.

artifacts.label: Production artifact intent BFF server snapshot UI
artifacts.note: Captured after v8.12.92 dashboard AI sidebar generated a server-snapshot artifact through the BFF intent route.

completedImprovements.title: Artifact intent deterministic routing migrated to BFF and verified on Vercel production v8.12.92
completedImprovements.note: Frontend artifact routing now uses /api/ai/artifact-intent for pre-send decisions, production API classification returns decidedBy=bff, UI artifact generation succeeds, and conversational routes are not incorrectly converted into artifacts.

notes: Intent API cold measurements: first server-snapshot and server-monitoring calls were 1086ms and 1304ms; warmed deterministic calls were 136-161ms for ops/incident paths and one repeated snapshot was 601ms.

Repeated latency probing intentionally exceeded the aiAnalysis 10/min rate limiter and produced 429 console resource errors. This is recorded as non-blocking because a later reset check returned 200 and the product UI generated the artifact successfully.
Standard five-question conversational AI QA was executed in this release run and passed all five questions.
No live Vision QA was run because Vision was outside the routing migration scope.
